content.en:
"My cultivation has reached the thirteen-dimensional realm, but I don't have any understanding of the ultimate dimension killing moves, could it be that I really have to surpass the eighteenth dimension, and only after surpassing the ultimate can I hope to comprehend the ultimate dimensional killing moves?"

Ye Tian thought so.

In short, it is extremely difficult to master an ultimate dimensional killing move, and it is not that easy.

Moreover, Ye Tian also knew very well that it was not possible for him to cultivate alone.

"You have to build a force!"

Ye Tian decided.

Only by forming a force and letting many of his subordinates collect a large number of divine secrets, resources, etc. for themselves, can he hope to grow to the eighteenth dimension and even the ultimate level.

Xuantian Domain, Dongping City.

This is only a medium-sized city, and there are not many strong people, far inferior to Xuantian City.

However, this place is very suitable for Ye Tian to form a force.

And he could also discover that some geniuses with powerful divine talents could completely take them in his hands and secretly cultivate them when they were children before they began to cultivate.

After a while.

Ye Tian collected a total of 23 thousands of children, among which the lowest talent was a three-star divine dimension talent, and the one with the highest talent reached a nine-star divine dimension talent.

After that, Ye Tian even created many secret methods suitable for them, and cultivated them according to special cultivation methods.

And Ye Tian named the force he formed Tianwei Pavilion.

Tianwei Pavilion has been honestly staying in Dongping City from the beginning, and they are all cultivating, and under Ye Tian's careful cultivation, the first batch of members of Tianwei Pavilion have grown up rapidly these days.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of gods had passed the healing years.

After these long years of cultivation, Ye Tian has already collected hundreds of thousands of Tianwei Pavilion members, and the first batch of Tianwei Pavilion members have grown up, and the one with the highest strength is Chen Jingying, who has the talent of the Nine Star Divine Dimension, and now he has improved his strength to the ten-dimensional realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian attaches great importance to her and often instructs her, and her strength can be called the top level in the Ten Dimensional Realm.

......

"Pavilion Master, this is a batch of Divine Secret Methods that have been collected recently!"

Chen Jingying handed over a batch of Shenwei secret methods to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took it and took a brief look, most of them were rubbish, and they had no reference value for him, but there were also a few books that had a bit of reference value, which contained some special knowledge, which Ye Tian had not seen before.

"Okay, you go down!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

Chen Jingying stepped back.

this day.

Somewhere in the Xuantian Domain, a Shenwei crack appeared, attracting many strong people.

And Tianwei Pavilion informed Ye Tian of the news as soon as possible.

"Divine Dimension Rift!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

As far as he knew, inside these divine dimensional cracks was a small world, and often these small worlds would contain some opportunities.

And the strong who can block the crack of the divine dimension is at least fifteen dimensions, and the physical strength of such a strong person can already suppress the dimensional void with one hand.

Such a place must be very dangerous.

"I have to break through, I'm getting slower and slower now, although compared to other strong people, my strength has improved rapidly, but my goal is different from theirs. I need more chance. "

Therefore, he decided to break through that divine dimension rift, even if it really fell, it would be a big deal for him to come here again and start practicing from scratch.

It's just that the first advent is free, and the second Void Heaven Palace has to be charged.

......

Divine Dimension Rift.

When Ye Tian came here, he met many strong people, many of whom were strong in the fourteenth dimension.

Over the years, Ye Tian has been cultivating asceticly, but his strength has not progressed quickly, and he is still in the thirteenth dimension, but it should belong to the late stage of the thirteenth dimension, not far from the realm of the fourteenth dimension.

Swish!

Ye Tian entered this Divine Dimension Crack, and as soon as he entered, he saw a large number of strong people, all of whom stopped here and did not continue to advance.

Ahead was a river that ran through the void, and they were stopped by this river, and no one dared to cross it.

"This River ......"

Ye Tian sensed the terrifying power above, and it seemed to be an alien thing, but even if it was suppressed by the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, this river could still easily obliterate the ordinary fourteenth dimensional powerhouse.

"This is the water of the Sea of Dimensions, flowing into our Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, it is said that even the powerhouses of the Eighteenth Dimensional Realm dare not step into the Sea of Dimensions!" a powerhouse of the Fifteenth Dimensional Realm sighed.

"What should we do, even if the water of the Dimension Sea is suppressed in our Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, it is not something we can cross over?" said a powerhouse of the Fourteenth Dimension Realm worriedly.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the waters of this dimensional sea are indeed terrible and can corrode our bodies, but I see that this river is only long, not wide, and we have hope of breaking through the river and going straight through. "

A fifteenth-dimensional powerhouse said.

"Breaking through this river, this requires a special killer move!"

A strong man said.

"Hahaha, I just have the means to do that!"

A fifteen-dimensional powerhouse displayed a terrifying physical body, and a blow pierced through.

Rumble!!!!!

The river was separated, and in that instant, the strong man crossed the river, and a strong man of the fourteenth dimension wanted to follow him.

As a result, the speed was a little slower, directly covered by the river, and then the flesh was shattered and died.

A fourteen-dimensional powerhouse, placed in the Xuantian Domain, that is the existence of the top 277, ended up dying here.

Next, several more fifteen-dimensional powerhouses broke through the river and successfully crossed it, and there were also fifteen-dimensional powerhouses who could not pass through in time.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to try, and he was not sure that he would break through the river, so he had to create his own special killing moves.

Similarly, other strong people are trying to create such a killer move, but this is not something that can be done in a short period of time.

Ye Tian's advantage is his experience and insight in cultivating for countless years.

As for the talent of the gods, he is not higher than these powerhouses.

Time passed, and a period of time passed.

The strong people inside haven't come out yet, and I don't know if they are in danger or unwilling to come out when they encounter a big opportunity.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created a killing move that could break through the river.

"Break the Sky!"

Ye Tian struck with a blow, and the dimensional void distorted, directly breaking through this river.

And he crossed straight into the past.

Seeing that a thirteen-dimensional powerhouse had crossed the river, many powerhouses were stunned one by one, and even wondered if they were too wasteful?

After crossing the river, Ye Tian saw a huge tomb, and those strong people had already entered the tomb.
